name: Hydrocarbon Dynamics Limited
summary: Hydrocarbon Dynamics Limited engages in evaluating, exploring, and developing oil and gas prospects, and technologies in North America and internationally. It offers clean oil technology that allows for the swift, clean, and treatment of heavy, asphaltenic, and paraffinic oils. The company holds 100% interests in the Utah Heavy Oil project covering an area of 3,458 acres located in the Uinta Basin in Utah. Hydrocarbon Dynamics Limited is headquartered in Melbourne, Australia.
